calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-02-2018 Off Calendar

Application For Default Judgment Prove-Up Hearing
Off Calendar Feb-01-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing as to defendant Tiffany Conley.
Dept. 514. Judge: Lynn O'Malley Taylor. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Laura Reding, CSR 711. Telephone: 415-551-0333.

Lawrence L. Lockwood, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Progressive Direct Insurance Company.
Sara Abdelwahed, Claims Adjuster for plaintiff, was placed under oath and testified.
No appearance by defaulted defendant Tiffany Conley.
Default was entered against defendant on September 29, 2015.
DOE defendants were dismissed on September 29, 2015.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Progressive Direct Insurance Company, and against the Defaulted Defendant Tiffany Conley, as follows:

Damages - $308,229.54.
Costs - $509.00.
Total - $308,738.54.

Proposed Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
